fields.formulaExpression:
case when Is_DMU__c ='true' then Id
else DPSS_DMU__c
end
fields.label: DMU_calculation
fields.name: DMU_calculation

fields.formulaExpression:
case 
when Industry__c in ('Media','Transport/Samferdsel/Post','Varehandel/Butikk/Hotell/Restaurant')
then 'Klynge1'
when Industry__c in ('Bygg/Anlegg','Industri/Kraftforsyning', 'Primærnæring: Jordbruk/Skogbruk, Fiske/Bergverk')
then 'Klynge2'
when Industry__c in ('Bank/Finans/Forsikring', 'Forretningsmessig tjenesteyting', 'IT/Telekom')
then 'Klynge3'
when Industry__c in ('Annen','Helse/Sosial','Offentlig forvaltning/Politi/Forsvar','Shipping/Olje/Offshore','Undervisning/Forskning')
then 'Klynge4'
else 'Uten Klynge'
end
fields.label: Klynge_Medium
fields.name: Klynge_Medium

fields.formulaExpression:

then 1
else 0
end
fields.label: Har IA potensiale
fields.name: Har_IA_potensiale

fields.formulaExpression:
case 
when
Fiber_cost__c = 0
then 999999
else
Fiber_cost__c
end
fields.label: Fibercost
fields.name: Fibercost

fields.formulaExpression:
case Street_address__c
	when Street_address__c =''
	then '.'
    else
	Street_address__c
end
fields.label: street calculated
fields.name: street_calculated

fields.formulaExpression:
case 
when street_calculated ='.'
then concat(Postal_address__c)
else
concat (street_calculated,',',Postal_address__c)
end
fields.label: Full_Adress_1
fields.name: Full_Adress_1

fields.formulaExpression:
case 
	when (Fiber_cost__c = 10000)
    Then 'Fiber (10K)'
    when (Fiber_cost__c = 40000)
    Then 'Fiber (40K)'
    when (Fiber_cost__c between 40000 and 60000)
    Then 'Fiber (60K)'
    when (Fiber_cost__c between 60000 and 500000)
    then concat('Fiberkost ',Fiber_cost__c_to_dimension)
	else
	'Fiber ikke tilgjengelig'
end
fields.label: Fibercost_text_1
fields.name: Fibercost_text_1

fields.formulaExpression:
case 
	when Capacity_code__c >= 1 and Coverage_5G_P__c >2
    Then 'Trådløst Bredbånd Bedrift inntil 400 MB'
    ELSE
    case
	when Capacity_code__c >= 1 and Coverage_4GP40__c >2
    Then 'Trådløst Bredbånd Bedrift inntil 60 MB'
    ELSE
    case
	when Capacity_code__c >= 1 and Coverage_4G_Plus__c >2
    Then 'Trådløst Bredbånd Bedrift inntil 40 MB'
    else
    case
   	when Capacity_code__c >= 1 and Coverage_4G__c >2
    Then 'Trådløst Bredbånd Bedrift inntil 20 MB'
	else
	'Trådløst Bredbånd Bedrift ikke tilgjengelig'
    end
    end
 end
  end

fields.name: TBB_coverage_text_1

fields.formulaExpression:

then concat(Postal_address__c)

concat (street_calculated,',',Postal_address__c)
end

fields.formulaExpression: 'Har IA som eier eller bruker, DMU eller underliggende'
fields.label: Have_IA
fields.name: Have_IA

fields.formulaExpression:
case when 
Personalization_18__c= 'Nysalg kaldt'
then 'C360_352'
when Personalization_18__c= 'Nysalg har mobil'
then 'C360_430'
when 
Personalization_18__c= 'Dypsalg'
then 'C360_212'
when 
Personalization_18__c= 'Mersalg'
then 'C360_429'
else''
end
fields.label: Campaign_cd_splitt
fields.name: Campaign_cd_splitt

fields.formulaExpression:
case when
contains(DMU_calculation, '001')
then 'Har IA i DMU Struktur'
else 'Har ikke IA i DMU Struktur'
end
fields.label: IA_calc_18
fields.name: IA_calc_18

fields.formulaExpression:
case when
contains("Transform5.DMU_calculation_mobil_tale", '001')
then 'Har Mobil i DMU Struktur'
else 'Har ikke Mobil i DMU Struktur'
end
fields.label: Mobil_calc
fields.name: Mobil_calc

fields.formulaExpression:
CASE
    WHEN IA_calc_18 = 'Har ikke IA i DMU Struktur'
         AND Mobil_calc = 'Har ikke Mobil i DMU Struktur'
         AND SUM_NBR_FIXED_BBB_FIBER__c< 1
    THEN 'Nysalg kaldt'

    WHEN IA_calc_18 = 'Har ikke IA i DMU Struktur'
         AND Mobil_calc = 'Har Mobil i DMU Struktur'
         AND SUM_NBR_FIXED_BBB_FIBER__c< 1
    THEN 'Nysalg har mobil'

    WHEN IA_calc_18 = 'Har IA i DMU Struktur'
         AND SUM_NBR_FIXED_BBB_FIBER__c>= 1
         and SUM_Har_IA_potensiale >=1
    THEN 'Dypsalg'
        WHEN IA_calc_18 = 'Har IA i DMU Struktur'
         AND SUM_NBR_FIXED_BBB_FIBER__c >= 1
         and SUM_Har_IA_potensiale <1
    THEN 'Mersalg'

    ELSE 'Uklassifisert'
END
fields.label: Personalization_18__c
fields.name: Personalization_18__c

fields.label: NBR fiber TBB som eier eller bruker
fields.name: NBR_Fiber_TBB_som_eier_bruker

fields.formulaExpression:
case when"Output.Aggregate3.UNIQUE_farid_txt" >= 5 and SUM_NBR_FIXED_BBB_FIBER__c <1
then "Output.Join1.Klynge_Medium"
when ("Output.Aggregate3.UNIQUE_farid_txt" >=1
and "Output.Aggregate3.UNIQUE_farid_txt"<=4 and SUM_NBR_FIXED_BBB_FIBER__c <1)
then 'Loyalty'
else ' UT'
end
fields.label: Personalization 1
fields.name: Personalization_1__c

fields.formulaExpression:
case
when ("Output.Aggregate3.UNIQUE_farid_txt" >=1 
and SUM_NBR_FIXED_BBB_FIBER__c >=2) 
then "Output.Join1.Klynge_Medium"
else 'UT'
end
fields.label: Personalization 1 dypsalg
fields.name: Personalization_1__c_dypsalg

fields.formulaExpression:
case
when ("Output.Aggregate3.UNIQUE_farid_txt" <1 
and SUM_NBR_FIXED_BBB_FIBER__c >=2) 
then "Output.Join1.Klynge_Medium"
else 'UT'
end
fields.label: Personalization 1 ikke IA potensiale
fields.name: Personalization_1__c_ikke_IA_potensiale
